query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.open_id, u.role, e.id as est_id, e.name as est_name, eu.role as eu_role FROM users u LEFT JOIN establishment_users eu ON u.id = eu.user_id LEFT JOIN establishments e ON eu.establishment_id = e.id ORDER BY u.id;
